violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizer was less than 10 ppm parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Container was refilled to adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed in 3-bay to be sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. Test strips to be ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Handwashing sinks are lacking handwashing signs. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

Chemicals were stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
The milk cooler located in the back area was not in good repair. Water is accumulating at the bottom. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

Establishment does not have a service sink to dispose mop water. Per person in charge, establishment disposes water outside. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Establishment must install a mop sink or discontinue using a mop that requires the disposal of liquid waste. Per person in charge, a spray mop with disposable pads will be used. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
